case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JOSE RIOS ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIOS, JOSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 333 TAYLOR STREET, UNIT 73, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, **APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS.**

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIOS, JOSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE; $1,582.00 RENT, $485.00 COSTS, $1,529.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,596.00, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
